name: Sorrento Back Beach
editorNote: The back beach is where Sorrento stops performing and starts feeling elemental. The surf side has more force, more wind, and far better dusk light than the bay, which is why locals drift here late in the day even when they have spent the morning elsewhere. Swim only when conditions suit and the flags are up, but walk it in any season. The stretch from the car park toward Diamond Bay is one of the easiest ways to understand why the southern tip of the Peninsula feels like a different region entirely.

heroImage.alt: Sorrento back beach at dusk with limestone cliffs and rolling surf
